from sqlalchemy.orm import Session
from sqlalchemy import select, func
from models import Order, OrderItem


def calculate_user_totals(session: Session, user_ids: list[int]) -> dict[int, float]:
    rows = session.execute(
        select(Order.user_id, func.sum(Order.total).label("total"))
        .where(Order.user_id.in_(user_ids))
        .group_by(Order.user_id)
    ).all()
    return {row.user_id: row.total for row in rows}


def get_order_item_counts(session: Session, order_ids: list[int]) -> dict[int, int]:
    rows = session.execute(
        select(OrderItem.order_id, func.count().label("count"))
        .where(OrderItem.order_id.in_(order_ids))
        .group_by(OrderItem.order_id)
    ).all()
    return {row.order_id: row.count for row in rows}


def find_recent_orders_per_user(session: Session, user_ids: list[int]) -> dict[int, dict]:
    subq = (
        select(
            Order.user_id,
            func.max(Order.created_at).label("max_created")
        )
        .where(Order.user_id.in_(user_ids))
        .group_by(Order.user_id)
        .subquery()
    )
    rows = session.execute(
        select(Order).join(
            subq,
            (Order.user_id == subq.c.user_id) & (Order.created_at == subq.c.max_created)
        )
    ).scalars().all()
    return {o.user_id: {"id": o.id, "total": o.total} for o in rows}
